summary: Created blossomClient.ts with buildBlossomAuthEvent(signer, ciphertextSha256) producing kind-24242 BUD-01 auth events, put(encryptedBytes, signer, onProgress?) with 3-retry exponential backoff (RETRY_DELAYS=[500,1500,5000]ms), and get(blobUrl) returning Uint8Array. BlossomUploadError thrown on 4xx immediately and after 3 retries on 5xx. BlossomNotFoundError thrown specifically on 404. Auth header encoded as 'Nostr <base64(JSON)>'. BLOSSOM_BASE_URL sourced from config/blossom.ts. RETRY_DELAYS exported for test override. 12 unit tests cover all AC paths using vi.stubGlobal fetch mock and 0ms override for retry delays.
